title: Kingfisher Foil Food Containers and Lid, Silver, Large, Pack of 6
features: Suitable for oven and fridge freezer
description: Product Description Manufactured from the house of kingfisher, operates over 1,100 stores and growing Omni channel operations across 10 countries in Europe. Following an in-depth review of kingfisher’s businesses alongside in-depth studies of our customers’ home improvement needs, the leadership team announced the 'one' kingfisher plan. This plan will leverage the scale of the business by creating a unified company, where customer needs always come first. Box Contains 1 x Large Foil Food Containers and Lid - 6 Pack
